subject: 浏览器渲染渲染流水线

content.principles: 1. Parse HTML to DOM. 2. Parse CSS to CSSOM. 3. Combine to Render Tree. 4. Layout (compute geometry). 5. Paint (draw pixels). 6. Compositing (layer management). GPU acceleration for transform/opacity.
content.pitfalls: Reflow (Layout) is expensive; triggered by changing geometry. Repaint is cheaper but still costly. Script blocking HTML parsing (use async/defer).
